title: feat: separate price from cost in model registry
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: The price is right
gist.blurb: We've upgraded our model registry to support flexible pricing structures. This behind-the-scenes magic helps us keep the hive healthy and sustainable!
gist.summary: Updated the model registry architecture to decouple user-facing pricing from underlying provider costs.
gist.impact: This enables more flexible and sustainable pricing structures across our text and image endpoints, ensuring long-term availability of top-tier models.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a shopkeeper or accountant. A cute pixel art cash register or ledger book with a glowing lime green screen. Nomnom creature eating a receipt.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny accountant glasses, standing next to a chunky retro cash register with a glowing lime green (#ecf874) screen. The round Nomnom creature is happily eating a long paper receipt. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm and nostalgic.
